info.name: 📌 fal.ai API
info.description:
### About

"The generative media platform for developers."

### Prerequisites

- Postman Account
    
- fal.ai Account: [https://fal.ai/dashboard](https://fal.ai/dashboard)
    

### Usage

1. Create a fork
    
2. Update collection variables
    
3. Send requests
    

### Documentation

- API: [https://fal.ai/dashboard](https://fal.ai/dashboard)
    
- Models: [https://fal.ai/models](https://fal.ai/models)

request.description: Create a text completion with the specified model from AI Studio using the chat format. You need to provide the list of messages, where each message is a dictionary with two keys: `role`, which is one of `system` / `user` / `assistant` , and `message` , which is a string - the content of the message.

body.raw:
{
     "lyrics": "[verse]
Staring at the sunset, colors paint the sky
Thoughts of you keep swirling, can't deny
I know I let you down, I made mistakes
But I'm here to mend the heart I didn't break

[chorus]
Every road you take, I'll be one step behind
Every dream you chase, I'm reaching for the light
You can't fight this feeling now
I won't back down
You know you can't deny it now
I won't back down
",
     "genres": "inspiring female uplifting pop airy vocal electronic bright vocal vocal"
   }
